headline: Uber Bears Are Missing the Story and Our $123.73 Price Target Shows Why
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) trades at $73.23 as of writing, sitting 29% below its 52-week high of $101.99 and down 11.6% year-to-date. Our price target is $123.73, roughly 71% upside over the next 12 months. The model’s recommendation signal is BUY, with a 90% confidence level. headline: Amazon Expands AI And Retail Reach As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Amazon Web Services and Uber expanded their partnership, with Uber adopting Amazon's Graviton and Trainium3 chips for its workloads. Amazon joined Anthropic's Project Glasswing cybersecurity AI initiative as a launch partner, gaining early access to advanced threat detection tools. Martha Stewart selected Amazon for the exclusive launch of a new kitchen electrics line on the platform. These updates arrive as Amazon.com (NasdaqGS: AMZN) trades at $213.77, with the share price up 25.3% over...

headline: Pony.ai Advances Global Deployment with Launch of Europe's First Commercial Robotaxi Service in Zagreb
summary: Pony AI Inc. ("Pony.ai") (NASDAQ: PONY; HKEX: 2026), a global leader in the large-scale commercialization of autonomous driving technology, today announced that its robotaxi program in partnership with Verne and Uber has officially begun commercial service in Zagreb, Croatia, marking Europe's first commercial robotaxi service.

headline: Home Depot Taps AI Leader Fran Bell As CTO With Upside Potential
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has appointed Dr. Franziska "Fran" Bell as its new EVP and Chief Technology Officer. Dr. Bell brings enterprise AI and digital transformation experience from Ford, BP, Uber, and Toyota. The appointment signals a push to deepen AI and technology integration across Home Depot’s retail and professional platforms. Home Depot, trading at $318.77, is a major player in the US home improvement market, serving both consumers and professional contractors. The stock shows mixed...
